name: shell
description: Shell and Python execution service using os/exec over MCP-lite.

tools.name: shell.exec
tools.description: Execute a shell command or argv with timeout and bounded output.

command.description: Command string. Use with use_shell=true or simple whitespace split.

argv.description: Preferred explicit argv; first item is executable.

cwd.description: Working directory relative to service root.

tools.name: python.run
tools.description: Execute Python code or script path via python3 with timeout and bounded output.

code.description: Python code string to run with -c.

script_path.description: Path to script file relative to service root.

cwd.description: Working directory relative to service root.
